note: FreeDocStore standards registry. Maps a repo/slice's detectable signals to the gold-standard KB(s) it should be judged against. Producer: FreeDocStore. Consumers: VibeCode QA and any AI that judges code against a fixed standard instead of its own memory. See SCHEMA.md.

signals.note: Reference of the atoms a `detect` predicate may test, gathered per slice by the resolver.
signals.dep: a dependency name present in the slice's package.json (deps + devDeps)
signals.file: an exact file present in the slice
signals.fileGlob: a glob matched within the slice
signals.config: a parsed key present (e.g. wrangler.toml has [[d1_databases]])

standards.title: React SPA
standards.summary: React, client-rendered, hosted as static files. No SSR, no server of its own.

standards.title: Cloudflare Pages Functions (fullstack)
standards.summary: Server-side API co-deployed with a static frontend as Cloudflare Pages Functions. Edge runtime, bindings, no long-lived server.

standards.title: Cloudflare Worker
standards.summary: A standalone Cloudflare Worker (or Durable Object) service. Edge runtime, module worker, bindings.

standards.title: Node service / CLI
standards.summary: A Node runtime program: an HTTP service or a command-line tool. Not shipped to a browser.

standards.title: Library / SDK
standards.summary: A published package consumed by other code. No app entry, no server; exports an API surface.

standards.title: React SSR
standards.summary: Server-rendered React (Next.js / React Router framework mode / Remix). A server renders HTML.

standards.title: Cloudflare D1
standards.summary: SQLite-at-the-edge: schema, migrations discipline, parameterized queries, local/remote parity.

standards.title: MCP server
standards.summary: Exposes tools/resources over the Model Context Protocol. Composes onto whatever runtime hosts it (worker-edge, node-service). Tool schemas, auth scopes, read-before-write, audit.

standards.title: Tailwind CSS
standards.summary: Utility-first styling. v4 CSS-first config, tokens in @theme, no runtime CSS-in-JS.

standards.title: TanStack Query
standards.summary: Server-cache for remote data: caching, dedupe, retries, loading/error modelling.

standards.title: Zod validation
standards.summary: Runtime schema validation at boundaries; one schema shared by form and API edge.

standards.title: TypeScript
standards.summary: Strict flags, project references, no-any, typed-and-validated boundaries.

standards.title: Security
standards.summary: Secrets handling, input validation, XSS/injection, dependency supply chain.

standards.title: Testing
standards.summary: Runner choice, behavior-not-implementation, coverage floor, CI gating.

standards.title: Accessibility
standards.summary: Semantics, keyboard, focus, ARIA, contrast. Applies to any UI-rendering slice.

standards.title: Dependency hygiene
standards.summary: Lockfile pinning, audit, vetting, no unexpected install scripts.

standards.title: React SPA on Cloudflare Pages (with Functions)
standards.summary: Blessed combo: a react-spa frontend co-deployed with a pages-fullstack API in one Pages project. Contains only the SEAM rules; composes the primitives.
seamTopics: _routes.json excludes the SPA from function matching
secrets live in Functions, never the client bundle
shared types between functions and app via a workspace package
one Pages deploy builds both; migrations gate the build
